creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2006-12-20 02:31:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/nss_ldap         Makefile 
    net/nss_ldap/files   patch-ldap-pwd.c 
  Removed files:
    net/nss_ldap         pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - In some cases (like sudo), we should check euid not uid, thanks for
    jnlin at csie.nctu.edu.tw
  - Use MAN5PREFIX
  - portlint warns:
    1) IGNORE should be lowercase-lead
    2) INSTALLS_SHLIB should be replaced by USE_LDCONFIG
    3) PLIST_FILES should be used when only two files
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/104310
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin_AT_gslin dot org>
  Approved by:    maintainer (timeout)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.20      +7 -5      ports/net/nss_ldap/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/net/nss_ldap/files/patch-ldap-pwd.c
  1.4       +0 -2      ports/net/nss_ldap/pkg-plist (dead)
